# RankFixer — AI Website Recommendation Engine
# llms.txt — key pages for LLM discovery

RankFixer analyzes website AI visibility across 7 signals. Free open-source tool under MIT license.

- Home: https://rankfixer.co
- AI Visibility Checker: https://rankfixer.co/ai-visibility-checker
- Research: https://rankfixer.co/research
- Blog: https://rankfixer.co/blog
- GitHub: https://github.com/rankfixer-ai/rankfixer-core
